briefs.thesis_or_watch_reason: First viable slice test; tech earnings.
briefs.catalyst_summary: Upcoming earnings report scheduled for April 2026, which is expected to provide insights into product sales and services growth. Additionally, recent product launches may influence performance.
briefs.risk_summary: Key risks include competitive pressures from other tech firms, potential supply chain disruptions, and macroeconomic factors such as inflation affecting consumer spending.

evidence_sources.title: Apple's Earnings Pressures Ahead of Q2

open_questions: How will the upcoming earnings compare year-over-year?
What impact will competition have on Apple's market share in the imminent quarter?
